utility_evaluation.REASONING:
The required format has 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, total_budget. The final property solution includes all 6 corresponding top-level items. Now check if each is fully specified with details:
- property: includes description, location, size, features, price, condition — sufficient details and price present.
- financing: includes type, LTV, down payment, monthly payment, arrangement fee, qualification status — terms provided.
- legal_services: provider, service, cost, contact person, phone, email, reference, timeline — fully specified with costs.
- moving_services: provider, service, cost, contact person, phone, email, reference, timeline — fully specified with costs.
- setup_services: includes property_survey (provider, service, cost, contact, phone, reference) and utilities (provider, service, cost, phone, timeline) — sufficient.
- total_budget: itemized costs including property price, down payment, services costs, arrangement fee, total upfront costs, monthly payment, available funds, remaining buffer — complete breakdown present.
All 6 items are present and fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: Identify items mentioned in the final property solution and match them to the ground-truth rating entries. Mapped items: Property corresponds to 'Family House'; Financing to 'First-Time Buyer'; Legal services to 'Premium Legal Package'; Property survey to 'Full Structural Survey'; Moving services to 'Standard Moving'; Utilities setup to 'Premium Utilities'.
